repair_reason: Install check failed: unknown; Readiness blocker: One or more required machine checks failed.; Readiness blocker: Missing: data/local/workspaces missing
operator_guidance_summary: Pause when deploy-bundle validate fails, upgrade is in progress, or rollback readiness is lost. Do not run real jobs until repair completes.

profile.name: Careful production cut
profile.description: Careful production cut: frozen scope, validated bundle, upgrade/rollback readiness required. For sustained production use.
profile.pause_guidance: Pause when deploy-bundle validate fails, upgrade is in progress, or rollback readiness is lost. Do not run real jobs until repair completes.
profile.repair_guidance: Run deploy-bundle validate and recovery-report. Fix all validation errors; ensure rollback checkpoint exists before any upgrade. Resume only when validation_passed and upgrade_readiness are true.
